revision.comment: disambiguate links ([[WP:D]])

Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
revision.text:
{{Navbox with collapsible groups | name = Rivers of Japan | state = {{{state<includeonly>|autocollapse</includeonly>}}} | selected = {{{selected|{{{expanded|{{{1|overview}}}}}}}}} | title = {{flagicon|Japan}} [[:en:List of rivers of Japan|River systems and rivers of Japan]] | image = | bodyclass = hlist
| abbr1 = Hokkaido | group1 = Rivers of [[:en:Hokkaidō|Hokkaidō]] | list1 = {{Navbox |child |groupstyle=font-weight:normal;
| group1 = [[:en:Sea of Japan|Sea of Japan]] | list1 = *[[:en:Ishikari River|Ishikari River]] **[[:en:Chitose River|Chitose River]] **[[:en:Toyohira River|Toyohira River]] ***[[:en:Makomanai River|Makomanai River]] ***[[:en:Anano River|Anano River]] **[[:en:Yūbari River|Yūbari River]] *[[:en:Koetoi River|Koetoi River]] *[[:en:Rumoi River|Rumoi River]] *[[:en:Shiribeshi-Toshibetsu River|Shiribeshi-Toshibetsu River]] *[[:en:Shiribetsu River|Shiribetsu River]] *[[:en:Teshio River|Teshio River]] *[[:en:Zenibako River|Zenibako River]]
| group2 = [[:en:Sea of Okhotsk|Sea of Okhotsk]] | list2 = *[[:en:Abashiri River|Abashiri River]] *[[:en:Shibetsu River|Shibetsu River]] *[[:en:Shokotsu River|Shokotsu River]] *[[:en:Tokoro River|Tokoro River]] *[[:en:Yūbetsu River|Yūbetsu River]]
| group3 = [[:en:Pacific Ocean|Pacific Ocean]] | list3 = *[[:en:Akan River|Akan River]] *[[:en:Kushiro River|Kushiro River]] *[[:en:Mitsuishi River|Mitsuishi River]] *[[:en:Mu River (Hokkaidō)|Mu River]] *[[:en:Niikappu River|Niikappu River]] *[[:en:Saru River|Saru River]] *[[:en:Shizunai River|Shizunai River]] *[[:en:Tokachi River|Tokachi River]]
| list4 = {{icon|Commons}} '''[[commons:Category:Rivers of Hokkaido|Rivers of Hokkaido on Commons]]''' }} | abbr2 = Honshu | group2 = Rivers of [[Honshu]] | list2 = {{Navbox |child |groupstyle=font-weight:normal;
| group1 = [[:en:Tōhoku region|Tōhoku region]] | list1 = *[[:en:Abukuma River|Abukuma River]] **[[:en:Arakawa River (Fukushima)|Arakawa River]] *[[:en:Iwaki River|Iwaki River]] *[[:en:Kitakami River|Kitakami River]] *[[:en:Komagome River|Komagome River]] *[[:en:Koyoshi River|Koyoshi River]] *[[:en:Mabechi River|Mabechi River]] *[[:en:Mogami River|Mogami River]] *[[:en:Natori River|Natori River]] *[[:en:Ōhata River|Ōhata River]] *[[:en:Oirase River|Oirase River]] *[[:en:Omono River|Omono River]] *[[:en:Takase River (Aomori)|Takase River]] *[[:en:Yoneshiro River|Yoneshiro River]]
| group2 = [[:en:Kantō region|Kantō region]] | list2 = *[[:en:Arakawa River (Kantō)|Arakawa River]] *[[:en:Edo River|Edo River]] *[[:en:Fuji River|Fuji River]] *[[:en:Kanda River|Kanda River]] *[[:en:Kuji River (Ibaraki)|Kuji River]] *[[Naka River (Saitama Tokyo)|Naka River]] *[[:en:Sagami River|Sagami River]] *[[:en:Sumida River|Sumida River]] *[[:en:Tama River|Tama River]] *[[:en:Tone River|Tone River]] *[[:en:Tsurumi River|Tsurumi River]]
| group3 = [[:en:Chūbu region|Chūbu region]] | list3 = *[[:en:Agano River|Agano River]] *[[:en:Shinano River|Shinano River]] *[[:en:Seki River|Seki River]] *[[:en:Hime River|Hime River]] *[[:en:Kurobe River|Kurobe River]] *[[:en:Jōganji River|Jōganji River]] *[[:en:Jinzū River|Jinzū River]] *[[:en:Shō River|Shō River]] *[[:en:Oyabe River|Oyabe River]] *[[:en:Tedori River|Tedori River]] *[[:en:Kuzuryū River|Kuzuryū River]] *[[:en:Fuji River|Fuji River]] *[[:en:Abe River|Abe River]] *[[:en:Ōi River|Ōi River]] *[[:en:Sakawa River|Sakawa River]] *[[Tenryū River]] *[[:en:Toyo River|Toyo River]] *[[:en:Yahagi River|Yahagi River]] *[[:en:Shōnai River|Shōnai River]] *[[:en:Kiso Three Rivers|Kiso Three Rivers]] **[[:en:Kiso River|Kiso River]] **[[:en:Nagara River|Nagara River]] **[[:en:Ibi River|Ibi River]] *[[:en:Kushida River|Kushida River]] *[[:en:Miya River (Mie)|Miya River]] *[[:en:Kita River|Kita River]] *[[:en:Minami River|Minami River]]
| group4 = [[:en:Kansai region|Kansai region]] | list4 = *[[:en:Choshi River|Choshi River]] *[[:en:Ibo River|Ibo River]] *[[:en:Kako River (Japan)|Kako River]] *[[:en:Kinokawa River|Kinokawa River]] *[[:en:Kumano River|Kumano River]] *[[:en:Kuzuryu River|Kuzuryu River]] *[[:en:Maruyama River|Maruyama River]] *[[:en:Muko River|Muko River]] *[[:en:Yamato River|Yamato River]] *[[:en:Yodo River|Yodo River]] **[[:en:Yasu River|Yasu River]] **[[:en:Katsura River|Katsura River]] **[[Kamo River]] **[[:en:Kizu River|Kizu River]] **[[:en:Dōtonbori|Dōton River]] *[[:en:Yura River (Japan)|Yura River]]
| group5 = [[:en:Chūgoku region|Chūgoku region]] | list5 = *[[:en:Asahi River|Asahi River]] *[[:en:Ashida River|Ashida River]] *[[:en:Gōnokawa River|Gōnokawa River]] *[[:en:Hino River|Hino River]] *[[:en:Hii River|Hii River]] *[[:en:Ōta River|Ōta River]] *[[:en:Oze River|Oze River]] *[[:en:Saba River (Japan)|Saba River]] *[[:en:Sendai River|Sendai River]] *[[:en:Takahashi River|Takahashi River]] *[[:en:Takatsu River|Takatsu River]] *[[:en:Tenjin River|Tenjin River]] *[[:en:Yoshii River|Yoshii River]]
|list6 =<!-- {{icon|Commons}} '''[[commons:Category:Rivers of Honshu|Rivers of Honshu on Commons]]'''--> }} | abbr3 = Shikoku | group3 = Rivers of [[Shikoku]] | list3 = {{Navbox |child |groupstyle=font-weight:normal; | list1 = *[[:en:Aibiki River|Aibiki River]] *[[:en:Shimanto River|Shimanto River]] *[[:en:Shinmachi River|Shinmachi River]] **[[:en:Suketō River|Suketō River]] **[[Tamiya River]] **[[Sako River]] **[[Sumiyoshijima River]] *[[:en:Yoshino River|Yoshino River]] **[[:en:Dōzan River|Dōzan River]] *[[:en:Niyodo River|Niyodo River]] |list2 =<!-- {{icon|Commons}} '''[[commons:Category:Rivers of Shikoku|Rivers of Shikoku on Commons]]'''--> }} | abbr4 = Kyushu | group4 = Rivers of [[Kyushu]] | list4 = {{Navbox |child |groupstyle=font-weight:normal;
| group1 = Kyushu | list1 = *[[:en:Arie River|Arie River]] *[[:en:Chikugo River|Chikugo River]] *[[:en:Kikuchi River|Kikuchi River]] *[[:en:Kuma River (Japan)|Kuma River]] *[[:en:Mimi River (Japan)|Mimi River]] *[[:en:Ōno River|Ōno River]] *[[:en:Ōyodo River|Ōyodo River]]
| group2 = [[:en:Yaeyama Islands|Yaeyama Islands]] | list2 = *[[:en:Kokuba River|Kokuba River]] *[[:en:Nakama River|Nakama River]] *[[:en:Urauchi River|Urauchi River]]
|list3 =<!-- {{icon|Commons}} '''[[commons:Category:Rivers of Kyushu|Rivers of Kyushu on Commons]]'''--> }} | belowclass = hlist | below = * {{Icon|category}} '''[[:Category:Rivers of Japan|Rivers of Japan Category]]''' * {{icon|Commons}} '''[[commons:Category:Rivers of Japan|Rivers of Japan on Commons]]''' }}<noinclude>{{documentation|content= == Usage == {{collapsible option}} {{Collapsible sections option | list = Hokkaido, Honshu, Shikoku, Kyushu | example = Honshu}} == See also == * [[:Category:Rivers of Japan]] [[Category:Asia river navigational boxes‎|Japan]] [[Category:Japan geography navigational boxes]] }}</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "[[commons:" to "[[co:commons:"
revision.text:
{{Navbox with collapsible groups | name = Rivers of Japan | state = {{{state<includeonly>|autocollapse</includeonly>}}} | selected = {{{selected|{{{expanded|{{{1|overview}}}}}}}}} | title = {{flagicon|Japan}} [[:en:List of rivers of Japan|River systems and rivers of Japan]] | image = | bodyclass = hlist
| abbr1 = Hokkaido | group1 = Rivers of [[:en:Hokkaidō|Hokkaidō]] | list1 = {{Navbox |child |groupstyle=font-weight:normal;
| group1 = [[:en:Sea of Japan|Sea of Japan]] | list1 = *[[:en:Ishikari River|Ishikari River]] **[[:en:Chitose River|Chitose River]] **[[:en:Toyohira River|Toyohira River]] ***[[:en:Makomanai River|Makomanai River]] ***[[:en:Anano River|Anano River]] **[[:en:Yūbari River|Yūbari River]] *[[:en:Koetoi River|Koetoi River]] *[[:en:Rumoi River|Rumoi River]] *[[:en:Shiribeshi-Toshibetsu River|Shiribeshi-Toshibetsu River]] *[[:en:Shiribetsu River|Shiribetsu River]] *[[:en:Teshio River|Teshio River]] *[[:en:Zenibako River|Zenibako River]]
| group2 = [[:en:Sea of Okhotsk|Sea of Okhotsk]] | list2 = *[[:en:Abashiri River|Abashiri River]] *[[:en:Shibetsu River|Shibetsu River]] *[[:en:Shokotsu River|Shokotsu River]] *[[:en:Tokoro River|Tokoro River]] *[[:en:Yūbetsu River|Yūbetsu River]]
| group3 = [[:en:Pacific Ocean|Pacific Ocean]] | list3 = *[[:en:Akan River|Akan River]] *[[:en:Kushiro River|Kushiro River]] *[[:en:Mitsuishi River|Mitsuishi River]] *[[:en:Mu River (Hokkaidō)|Mu River]] *[[:en:Niikappu River|Niikappu River]] *[[:en:Saru River|Saru River]] *[[:en:Shizunai River|Shizunai River]] *[[:en:Tokachi River|Tokachi River]]
| list4 = {{icon|Commons}} '''[[co:commons:Category:Rivers of Hokkaido|Rivers of Hokkaido on Commons]]''' }} | abbr2 = Honshu | group2 = Rivers of [[Honshu]] | list2 = {{Navbox |child |groupstyle=font-weight:normal;
| group1 = [[:en:Tōhoku region|Tōhoku region]] | list1 = *[[:en:Abukuma River|Abukuma River]] **[[:en:Arakawa River (Fukushima)|Arakawa River]] *[[:en:Iwaki River|Iwaki River]] *[[:en:Kitakami River|Kitakami River]] *[[:en:Komagome River|Komagome River]] *[[:en:Koyoshi River|Koyoshi River]] *[[:en:Mabechi River|Mabechi River]] *[[:en:Mogami River|Mogami River]] *[[:en:Natori River|Natori River]] *[[:en:Ōhata River|Ōhata River]] *[[:en:Oirase River|Oirase River]] *[[:en:Omono River|Omono River]] *[[:en:Takase River (Aomori)|Takase River]] *[[:en:Yoneshiro River|Yoneshiro River]]
| group2 = [[:en:Kantō region|Kantō region]] | list2 = *[[:en:Arakawa River (Kantō)|Arakawa River]] *[[:en:Edo River|Edo River]] *[[:en:Fuji River|Fuji River]] *[[:en:Kanda River|Kanda River]] *[[:en:Kuji River (Ibaraki)|Kuji River]] *[[Naka River (Saitama Tokyo)|Naka River]] *[[:en:Sagami River|Sagami River]] *[[:en:Sumida River|Sumida River]] *[[:en:Tama River|Tama River]] *[[:en:Tone River|Tone River]] *[[:en:Tsurumi River|Tsurumi River]]
| group3 = [[:en:Chūbu region|Chūbu region]] | list3 = *[[:en:Agano River|Agano River]] *[[:en:Shinano River|Shinano River]] *[[:en:Seki River|Seki River]] *[[:en:Hime River|Hime River]] *[[:en:Kurobe River|Kurobe River]] *[[:en:Jōganji River|Jōganji River]] *[[:en:Jinzū River|Jinzū River]] *[[:en:Shō River|Shō River]] *[[:en:Oyabe River|Oyabe River]] *[[:en:Tedori River|Tedori River]] *[[:en:Kuzuryū River|Kuzuryū River]] *[[:en:Fuji River|Fuji River]] *[[:en:Abe River|Abe River]] *[[:en:Ōi River|Ōi River]] *[[:en:Sakawa River|Sakawa River]] *[[Tenryū River]] *[[:en:Toyo River|Toyo River]] *[[:en:Yahagi River|Yahagi River]] *[[:en:Shōnai River|Shōnai River]] *[[:en:Kiso Three Rivers|Kiso Three Rivers]] **[[:en:Kiso River|Kiso River]] **[[:en:Nagara River|Nagara River]] **[[:en:Ibi River|Ibi River]] *[[:en:Kushida River|Kushida River]] *[[:en:Miya River (Mie)|Miya River]] *[[:en:Kita River|Kita River]] *[[:en:Minami River|Minami River]]
| group4 = [[:en:Kansai region|Kansai region]] | list4 = *[[:en:Choshi River|Choshi River]] *[[:en:Ibo River|Ibo River]] *[[:en:Kako River (Japan)|Kako River]] *[[:en:Kinokawa River|Kinokawa River]] *[[:en:Kumano River|Kumano River]] *[[:en:Kuzuryu River|Kuzuryu River]] *[[:en:Maruyama River|Maruyama River]] *[[:en:Muko River|Muko River]] *[[:en:Yamato River|Yamato River]] *[[:en:Yodo River|Yodo River]] **[[:en:Yasu River|Yasu River]] **[[:en:Katsura River|Katsura River]] **[[Kamo River]] **[[:en:Kizu River|Kizu River]] **[[:en:Dōtonbori|Dōton River]] *[[:en:Yura River (Japan)|Yura River]]
| group5 = [[:en:Chūgoku region|Chūgoku region]] | list5 = *[[:en:Asahi River|Asahi River]] *[[:en:Ashida River|Ashida River]] *[[:en:Gōnokawa River|Gōnokawa River]] *[[:en:Hino River|Hino River]] *[[:en:Hii River|Hii River]] *[[:en:Ōta River|Ōta River]] *[[:en:Oze River|Oze River]] *[[:en:Saba River (Japan)|Saba River]] *[[:en:Sendai River|Sendai River]] *[[:en:Takahashi River|Takahashi River]] *[[:en:Takatsu River|Takatsu River]] *[[:en:Tenjin River|Tenjin River]] *[[:en:Yoshii River|Yoshii River]]
|list6 =<!-- {{icon|Commons}} '''[[co:commons:Category:Rivers of Honshu|Rivers of Honshu on Commons]]'''--> }} | abbr3 = Shikoku | group3 = Rivers of [[Shikoku]] | list3 = {{Navbox |child |groupstyle=font-weight:normal; | list1 = *[[:en:Aibiki River|Aibiki River]] *[[:en:Shimanto River|Shimanto River]] *[[:en:Shinmachi River|Shinmachi River]] **[[:en:Suketō River|Suketō River]] **[[Tamiya River]] **[[Sako River]] **[[Sumiyoshijima River]] *[[:en:Yoshino River|Yoshino River]] **[[:en:Dōzan River|Dōzan River]] *[[:en:Niyodo River|Niyodo River]] |list2 =<!-- {{icon|Commons}} '''[[co:commons:Category:Rivers of Shikoku|Rivers of Shikoku on Commons]]'''--> }} | abbr4 = Kyushu | group4 = Rivers of [[Kyushu]] | list4 = {{Navbox |child |groupstyle=font-weight:normal;
| group1 = Kyushu | list1 = *[[:en:Arie River|Arie River]] *[[:en:Chikugo River|Chikugo River]] *[[:en:Kikuchi River|Kikuchi River]] *[[:en:Kuma River (Japan)|Kuma River]] *[[:en:Mimi River (Japan)|Mimi River]] *[[:en:Ōno River|Ōno River]] *[[:en:Ōyodo River|Ōyodo River]]
| group2 = [[:en:Yaeyama Islands|Yaeyama Islands]] | list2 = *[[:en:Kokuba River|Kokuba River]] *[[:en:Nakama River|Nakama River]] *[[:en:Urauchi River|Urauchi River]]
|list3 =<!-- {{icon|Commons}} '''[[co:commons:Category:Rivers of Kyushu|Rivers of Kyushu on Commons]]'''--> }} | belowclass = hlist | below = * {{Icon|category}} '''[[:Category:Rivers of Japan|Rivers of Japan Category]]''' * {{icon|Commons}} '''[[co:commons:Category:Rivers of Japan|Rivers of Japan on Commons]]''' }}<noinclude>{{documentation|content= == Usage == {{collapsible option}} {{Collapsible sections option | list = Hokkaido, Honshu, Shikoku, Kyushu | example = Honshu}} == See also == * [[:Category:Rivers of Japan]] [[Category:Asia river navigational boxes‎|Japan]] [[Category:Japan geography navigational boxes]] }}</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
{{Navbox with collapsible groups | name = Rivers of Japan | state = {{{state<includeonly>|autocollapse</includeonly>}}} | selected = {{{selected|{{{expanded|{{{1|overview}}}}}}}}} | title = {{flagicon|Japan}} [[:en:List of rivers of Japan|River systems and rivers of Japan]] | image = | bodyclass = hlist
| abbr1 = Hokkaido | group1 = Rivers of [[:en:Hokkaidō|Hokkaidō]] | list1 = {{Navbox |child |groupstyle=font-weight:normal;
| group1 = [[:en:Sea of Japan|Sea of Japan]] | list1 = *[[:en:Ishikari River|Ishikari River]] **[[:en:Chitose River|Chitose River]] **[[:en:Toyohira River|Toyohira River]] ***[[:en:Makomanai River|Makomanai River]] ***[[:en:Anano River|Anano River]] **[[:en:Yūbari River|Yūbari River]] *[[:en:Koetoi River|Koetoi River]] *[[:en:Rumoi River|Rumoi River]] *[[:en:Shiribeshi-Toshibetsu River|Shiribeshi-Toshibetsu River]] *[[:en:Shiribetsu River|Shiribetsu River]] *[[:en:Teshio River|Teshio River]] *[[:en:Zenibako River|Zenibako River]]
| group2 = [[:en:Sea of Okhotsk|Sea of Okhotsk]] | list2 = *[[:en:Abashiri River|Abashiri River]] *[[:en:Shibetsu River|Shibetsu River]] *[[:en:Shokotsu River|Shokotsu River]] *[[:en:Tokoro River|Tokoro River]] *[[:en:Yūbetsu River|Yūbetsu River]]
| group3 = [[:en:Pacific Ocean|Pacific Ocean]] | list3 = *[[:en:Akan River|Akan River]] *[[:en:Kushiro River|Kushiro River]] *[[:en:Mitsuishi River|Mitsuishi River]] *[[:en:Mu River (Hokkaidō)|Mu River]] *[[:en:Niikappu River|Niikappu River]] *[[:en:Saru River|Saru River]] *[[:en:Shizunai River|Shizunai River]] *[[:en:Tokachi River|Tokachi River]]
| list4 = {{icon|Commons}} '''[[co:commons:Category:Rivers of Hokkaido|Rivers of Hokkaido on Commons]]''' }} | abbr2 = Honshu | group2 = Rivers of [[Honshu]] | list2 = {{Navbox |child |groupstyle=font-weight:normal;
| group1 = [[:en:Tōhoku region|Tōhoku region]] | list1 = *[[:en:Abukuma River|Abukuma River]] **[[:en:Arakawa River (Fukushima)|Arakawa River]] *[[:en:Iwaki River|Iwaki River]] *[[:en:Kitakami River|Kitakami River]] *[[:en:Komagome River|Komagome River]] *[[:en:Koyoshi River|Koyoshi River]] *[[:en:Mabechi River|Mabechi River]] *[[:en:Mogami River|Mogami River]] *[[:en:Natori River|Natori River]] *[[:en:Ōhata River|Ōhata River]] *[[:en:Oirase River|Oirase River]] *[[:en:Omono River|Omono River]] *[[:en:Takase River (Aomori)|Takase River]] *[[:en:Yoneshiro River|Yoneshiro River]]
| group2 = [[:en:Kantō region|Kantō region]] | list2 = *[[:en:Arakawa River (Kantō)|Arakawa River]] *[[:en:Edo River|Edo River]] *[[:en:Fuji River|Fuji River]] *[[:en:Kanda River|Kanda River]] *[[:en:Kuji River (Ibaraki)|Kuji River]] *[[Naka River (Saitama Tokyo)|Naka River]] *[[:en:Sagami River|Sagami River]] *[[:en:Sumida River|Sumida River]] *[[:en:Tama River|Tama River]] *[[:en:Tone River|Tone River]] *[[:en:Tsurumi River|Tsurumi River]]
| group3 = [[:en:Chūbu region|Chūbu region]] | list3 = *[[:en:Agano River|Agano River]] *[[:en:Shinano River|Shinano River]] *[[:en:Seki River|Seki River]] *[[:en:Hime River|Hime River]] *[[:en:Kurobe River|Kurobe River]] *[[:en:Jōganji River|Jōganji River]] *[[:en:Jinzū River|Jinzū River]] *[[:en:Shō River|Shō River]] *[[:en:Oyabe River|Oyabe River]] *[[:en:Tedori River|Tedori River]] *[[:en:Kuzuryū River|Kuzuryū River]] *[[:en:Fuji River|Fuji River]] *[[:en:Abe River|Abe River]] *[[:en:Ōi River|Ōi River]] *[[:en:Sakawa River|Sakawa River]] *[[Tenryū River]] *[[:en:Toyo River|Toyo River]] *[[:en:Yahagi River|Yahagi River]] *[[:en:Shōnai River|Shōnai River]] *[[:en:Kiso Three Rivers|Kiso Three Rivers]] **[[:en:Kiso River|Kiso River]] **[[:en:Nagara River|Nagara River]] **[[:en:Ibi River|Ibi River]] *[[:en:Kushida River|Kushida River]] *[[:en:Miya River (Mie)|Miya River]] *[[:en:Kita River|Kita River]] *[[:en:Minami River|Minami River]]
| group4 = [[:en:Kansai region|Kansai region]] | list4 = *[[:en:Choshi River|Choshi River]] *[[:en:Ibo River|Ibo River]] *[[:en:Kako River (Japan)|Kako River]] *[[:en:Kinokawa River|Kinokawa River]] *[[:en:Kumano River|Kumano River]] *[[:en:Kuzuryu River|Kuzuryu River]] *[[:en:Maruyama River|Maruyama River]] *[[:en:Muko River|Muko River]] *[[:en:Yamato River|Yamato River]] *[[:en:Yodo River|Yodo River]] **[[:en:Yasu River|Yasu River]] **[[:en:Katsura River|Katsura River]] **[[Kamo River]] **[[:en:Kizu River|Kizu River]] **[[:en:Dōtonbori|Dōton River]] *[[:en:Yura River (Japan)|Yura River]]
| group5 = [[:en:Chūgoku region|Chūgoku region]] | list5 = *[[:en:Asahi River|Asahi River]] *[[:en:Ashida River|Ashida River]] *[[:en:Gōnokawa River|Gōnokawa River]] *[[:en:Hino River|Hino River]] *[[:en:Hii River|Hii River]] *[[:en:Ōta River|Ōta River]] *[[:en:Oze River|Oze River]] *[[:en:Saba River (Japan)|Saba River]] *[[:en:Sendai River|Sendai River]] *[[:en:Takahashi River|Takahashi River]] *[[:en:Takatsu River|Takatsu River]] *[[:en:Tenjin River|Tenjin River]] *[[:en:Yoshii River|Yoshii River]]
|list6 =<!-- {{icon|Commons}} '''[[co:commons:Category:Rivers of Honshu|Rivers of Honshu on Commons]]'''--> }} | abbr3 = Shikoku | group3 = Rivers of [[Shikoku]] | list3 = {{Navbox |child |groupstyle=font-weight:normal; | list1 = *[[:en:Aibiki River|Aibiki River]] *[[:en:Shimanto River|Shimanto River]] *[[:en:Shinmachi River|Shinmachi River]] **[[:en:Suketō River|Suketō River]] **[[Tamiya River]] **[[Sako River]] **[[Sumiyoshijima River]] *[[:en:Yoshino River|Yoshino River]] **[[:en:Dōzan River|Dōzan River]] *[[:en:Niyodo River|Niyodo River]] |list2 =<!-- {{icon|Commons}} '''[[co:commons:Category:Rivers of Shikoku|Rivers of Shikoku on Commons]]'''--> }} | abbr4 = Kyushu | group4 = Rivers of [[Kyushu]] | list4 = {{Navbox |child |groupstyle=font-weight:normal;
| group1 = Kyushu | list1 = *[[:en:Arie River|Arie River]] *[[:en:Chikugo River|Chikugo River]] *[[:en:Kikuchi River|Kikuchi River]] *[[:en:Kuma River (Japan)|Kuma River]] *[[:en:Mimi River (Japan)|Mimi River]] *[[:en:Ōno River|Ōno River]] *[[:en:Ōyodo River|Ōyodo River]]
| group2 = [[:en:Yaeyama Islands|Yaeyama Islands]] | list2 = *[[:en:Kokuba River|Kokuba River]] *[[:en:Nakama River|Nakama River]] *[[:en:Urauchi River|Urauchi River]]
|list3 =<!-- {{icon|Commons}} '''[[co:commons:Category:Rivers of Kyushu|Rivers of Kyushu on Commons]]'''--> }} | belowclass = hlist | below = * {{Icon|category}} '''[[:Category:Rivers of Japan|Rivers of Japan Category]]''' * {{icon|Commons}} '''[[co:commons:Category:Rivers of Japan|Rivers of Japan on Commons]]''' }}<noinclude>{{documentation|content= == Usage == {{collapsible option}} {{Collapsible sections option | list = Hokkaido, Honshu, Shikoku, Kyushu | example = Honshu}} == See also == * [[:Category:Rivers of Japan]] [[Category:Asia river navigational boxes‎|Japan]] [[Category:Japan geography navigational boxes]] }}</noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23575804085|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Navbox with collapsible groups | name = Rivers of Japan | state = {{{state<includeonly>|autocollapse</includeonly>}}} | selected = {{{selected|{{{expanded|{{{1|overview}}}}}}}}} | title = {{flagicon|Japan}} [[:en:List of rivers of Japan|River systems and rivers of Japan]] | image = | bodyclass = hlist
| abbr1 = Hokkaido | group1 = Rivers of [[:en:Hokkaidō|Hokkaidō]] | list1 = {{Navbox |child |groupstyle=font-weight:normal;
| group1 = [[:en:Sea of Japan|Sea of Japan]] | list1 = *[[:en:Ishikari River|Ishikari River]] **[[:en:Chitose River|Chitose River]] **[[:en:Toyohira River|Toyohira River]] ***[[:en:Makomanai River|Makomanai River]] ***[[:en:Anano River|Anano River]] **[[:en:Yūbari River|Yūbari River]] *[[:en:Koetoi River|Koetoi River]] *[[:en:Rumoi River|Rumoi River]] *[[:en:Shiribeshi-Toshibetsu River|Shiribeshi-Toshibetsu River]] *[[:en:Shiribetsu River|Shiribetsu River]] *[[:en:Teshio River|Teshio River]] *[[:en:Zenibako River|Zenibako River]]
| group2 = [[:en:Sea of Okhotsk|Sea of Okhotsk]] | list2 = *[[:en:Abashiri River|Abashiri River]] *[[:en:Shibetsu River|Shibetsu River]] *[[:en:Shokotsu River|Shokotsu River]] *[[:en:Tokoro River|Tokoro River]] *[[:en:Yūbetsu River|Yūbetsu River]]
| group3 = [[:en:Pacific Ocean|Pacific Ocean]] | list3 = *[[:en:Akan River|Akan River]] *[[:en:Kushiro River|Kushiro River]] *[[:en:Mitsuishi River|Mitsuishi River]] *[[:en:Mu River (Hokkaidō)|Mu River]] *[[:en:Niikappu River|Niikappu River]] *[[:en:Saru River|Saru River]] *[[:en:Shizunai River|Shizunai River]] *[[:en:Tokachi River|Tokachi River]]
| list4 = {{icon|Commons}} '''[[co:commons:Category:Rivers of Hokkaido|Rivers of Hokkaido on Commons]]''' }} | abbr2 = Honshu | group2 = Rivers of [[Honshu]] | list2 = {{Navbox |child |groupstyle=font-weight:normal;
| group1 = [[:en:Tōhoku region|Tōhoku region]] | list1 = *[[:en:Abukuma River|Abukuma River]] **[[:en:Arakawa River (Fukushima)|Arakawa River]] *[[:en:Iwaki River|Iwaki River]] *[[:en:Kitakami River|Kitakami River]] *[[:en:Komagome River|Komagome River]] *[[:en:Koyoshi River|Koyoshi River]] *[[:en:Mabechi River|Mabechi River]] *[[:en:Mogami River|Mogami River]] *[[:en:Natori River|Natori River]] *[[:en:Ōhata River|Ōhata River]] *[[:en:Oirase River|Oirase River]] *[[:en:Omono River|Omono River]] *[[:en:Takase River (Aomori)|Takase River]] *[[:en:Yoneshiro River|Yoneshiro River]]
| group2 = [[:en:Kantō region|Kantō region]] | list2 = *[[:en:Arakawa River (Kantō)|Arakawa River]] *[[:en:Edo River|Edo River]] *[[:en:Fuji River|Fuji River]] *[[:en:Kanda River|Kanda River]] *[[:en:Kuji River (Ibaraki)|Kuji River]] *[[Naka River (Saitama Tokyo)|Naka River]] *[[:en:Sagami River|Sagami River]] *[[:en:Sumida River|Sumida River]] *[[:en:Tama River|Tama River]] *[[:en:Tone River|Tone River]] *[[:en:Tsurumi River|Tsurumi River]]
| group3 = [[:en:Chūbu region|Chūbu region]] | list3 = *[[:en:Agano River|Agano River]] *[[:en:Shinano River|Shinano River]] *[[:en:Seki River|Seki River]] *[[:en:Hime River|Hime River]] *[[:en:Kurobe River|Kurobe River]] *[[:en:Jōganji River|Jōganji River]] *[[:en:Jinzū River|Jinzū River]] *[[:en:Shō River|Shō River]] *[[:en:Oyabe River|Oyabe River]] *[[:en:Tedori River|Tedori River]] *[[:en:Kuzuryū River|Kuzuryū River]] *[[:en:Fuji River|Fuji River]] *[[:en:Abe River|Abe River]] *[[:en:Ōi River|Ōi River]] *[[:en:Sakawa River|Sakawa River]] *[[Tenryū River]] *[[:en:Toyo River|Toyo River]] *[[:en:Yahagi River|Yahagi River]] *[[:en:Shōnai River|Shōnai River]] *[[:en:Kiso Three Rivers|Kiso Three Rivers]] **[[:en:Kiso River|Kiso River]] **[[:en:Nagara River|Nagara River]] **[[:en:Ibi River|Ibi River]] *[[:en:Kushida River|Kushida River]] *[[:en:Miya River (Mie)|Miya River]] *[[:en:Kita River|Kita River]] *[[:en:Minami River|Minami River]]
| group4 = [[:en:Kansai region|Kansai region]] | list4 = *[[:en:Choshi River|Choshi River]] *[[:en:Ibo River|Ibo River]] *[[:en:Kako River (Japan)|Kako River]] *[[:en:Kinokawa River|Kinokawa River]] *[[:en:Kumano River|Kumano River]] *[[:en:Kuzuryu River|Kuzuryu River]] *[[:en:Maruyama River|Maruyama River]] *[[:en:Muko River|Muko River]] *[[:en:Yamato River|Yamato River]] *[[:en:Yodo River|Yodo River]] **[[:en:Yasu River|Yasu River]] **[[:en:Katsura River|Katsura River]] **[[Kamo River]] **[[:en:Kizu River|Kizu River]] **[[:en:Dōtonbori|Dōton River]] *[[:en:Yura River (Japan)|Yura River]]
| group5 = [[:en:Chūgoku region|Chūgoku region]] | list5 = *[[:en:Asahi River|Asahi River]] *[[:en:Ashida River|Ashida River]] *[[:en:Gōnokawa River|Gōnokawa River]] *[[:en:Hino River|Hino River]] *[[:en:Hii River|Hii River]] *[[:en:Ōta River|Ōta River]] *[[:en:Oze River|Oze River]] *[[:en:Saba River (Japan)|Saba River]] *[[:en:Sendai River|Sendai River]] *[[:en:Takahashi River|Takahashi River]] *[[:en:Takatsu River|Takatsu River]] *[[:en:Tenjin River|Tenjin River]] *[[:en:Yoshii River|Yoshii River]]
|list6 =<!-- {{icon|Commons}} '''[[co:commons:Category:Rivers of Honshu|Rivers of Honshu on Commons]]'''--> }} | abbr3 = Shikoku | group3 = Rivers of [[Shikoku]] | list3 = {{Navbox |child |groupstyle=font-weight:normal; | list1 = *[[:en:Aibiki River|Aibiki River]] *[[:en:Shimanto River|Shimanto River]] *[[:en:Shinmachi River|Shinmachi River]] **[[:en:Suketō River|Suketō River]] **[[Tamiya River]] **[[Sako River]] **[[Sumiyoshijima River]] *[[:en:Yoshino River|Yoshino River]] **[[:en:Dōzan River|Dōzan River]] *[[:en:Niyodo River|Niyodo River]] |list2 =<!-- {{icon|Commons}} '''[[co:commons:Category:Rivers of Shikoku|Rivers of Shikoku on Commons]]'''--> }} | abbr4 = Kyushu | group4 = Rivers of [[Kyushu]] | list4 = {{Navbox |child |groupstyle=font-weight:normal;
| group1 = Kyushu | list1 = *[[:en:Arie River|Arie River]] *[[:en:Chikugo River|Chikugo River]] *[[:en:Kikuchi River|Kikuchi River]] *[[:en:Kuma River (Japan)|Kuma River]] *[[:en:Mimi River (Japan)|Mimi River]] *[[:en:Ōno River|Ōno River]] *[[:en:Ōyodo River|Ōyodo River]]
| group2 = [[:en:Yaeyama Islands|Yaeyama Islands]] | list2 = *[[:en:Kokuba River|Kokuba River]] *[[:en:Nakama River|Nakama River]] *[[:en:Urauchi River|Urauchi River]]
|list3 =<!-- {{icon|Commons}} '''[[co:commons:Category:Rivers of Kyushu|Rivers of Kyushu on Commons]]'''--> }} | belowclass = hlist | below = * {{Icon|category}} '''[[:Category:Rivers of Japan|Rivers of Japan Category]]''' * {{icon|Commons}} '''[[co:commons:Category:Rivers of Japan|Rivers of Japan on Commons]]''' }}<noinclude>{{documentation|content= == Usage == {{collapsible option}} {{Collapsible sections option | list = Hokkaido, Honshu, Shikoku, Kyushu | example = Honshu}} == See also == * [[:Category:Rivers of Japan]] [[Category:Asia river navigational boxes‎|Japan]] [[Category:Japan geography navigational boxes]] }}</noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Text replacement - "</noinclude>↵<noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{Navbox with collapsible groups | name = Rivers of Japan | state = {{{state<includeonly>|autocollapse</includeonly>}}} | selected = {{{selected|{{{expanded|{{{1|overview}}}}}}}}} | title = {{flagicon|Japan}} [[:en:List of rivers of Japan|River systems and rivers of Japan]] | image = | bodyclass = hlist
| abbr1 = Hokkaido | group1 = Rivers of [[:en:Hokkaidō|Hokkaidō]] | list1 = {{Navbox |child |groupstyle=font-weight:normal;
| group1 = [[:en:Sea of Japan|Sea of Japan]] | list1 = *[[:en:Ishikari River|Ishikari River]] **[[:en:Chitose River|Chitose River]] **[[:en:Toyohira River|Toyohira River]] ***[[:en:Makomanai River|Makomanai River]] ***[[:en:Anano River|Anano River]] **[[:en:Yūbari River|Yūbari River]] *[[:en:Koetoi River|Koetoi River]] *[[:en:Rumoi River|Rumoi River]] *[[:en:Shiribeshi-Toshibetsu River|Shiribeshi-Toshibetsu River]] *[[:en:Shiribetsu River|Shiribetsu River]] *[[:en:Teshio River|Teshio River]] *[[:en:Zenibako River|Zenibako River]]
| group2 = [[:en:Sea of Okhotsk|Sea of Okhotsk]] | list2 = *[[:en:Abashiri River|Abashiri River]] *[[:en:Shibetsu River|Shibetsu River]] *[[:en:Shokotsu River|Shokotsu River]] *[[:en:Tokoro River|Tokoro River]] *[[:en:Yūbetsu River|Yūbetsu River]]
| group3 = [[:en:Pacific Ocean|Pacific Ocean]] | list3 = *[[:en:Akan River|Akan River]] *[[:en:Kushiro River|Kushiro River]] *[[:en:Mitsuishi River|Mitsuishi River]] *[[:en:Mu River (Hokkaidō)|Mu River]] *[[:en:Niikappu River|Niikappu River]] *[[:en:Saru River|Saru River]] *[[:en:Shizunai River|Shizunai River]] *[[:en:Tokachi River|Tokachi River]]
| list4 = {{icon|Commons}} '''[[co:commons:Category:Rivers of Hokkaido|Rivers of Hokkaido on Commons]]''' }} | abbr2 = Honshu | group2 = Rivers of [[Honshu]] | list2 = {{Navbox |child |groupstyle=font-weight:normal;

| group2 = [[:en:Kantō region|Kantō region]] | list2 = *[[:en:Arakawa River (Kantō)|Arakawa River]] *[[:en:Edo River|Edo River]] *[[:en:Fuji River|Fuji River]] *[[:en:Kanda River|Kanda River]] *[[:en:Kuji River (Ibaraki)|Kuji River]] *[[Naka River (Saitama Tokyo)|Naka River]] *[[:en:Sagami River|Sagami River]] *[[:en:Sumida River|Sumida River]] *[[:en:Tama River|Tama River]] *[[:en:Tone River|Tone River]] *[[:en:Tsurumi River|Tsurumi River]]
| group3 = [[:en:Chūbu region|Chūbu region]] | list3 = *[[:en:Agano River|Agano River]] *[[:en:Shinano River|Shinano River]] *[[:en:Seki River|Seki River]] *[[:en:Hime River|Hime River]] *[[:en:Kurobe River|Kurobe River]] *[[:en:Jōganji River|Jōganji River]] *[[:en:Jinzū River|Jinzū River]] *[[:en:Shō River|Shō River]] *[[:en:Oyabe River|Oyabe River]] *[[:en:Tedori River|Tedori River]] *[[:en:Kuzuryū River|Kuzuryū River]] *[[:en:Fuji River|Fuji River]] *[[:en:Abe River|Abe River]] *[[:en:Ōi River|Ōi River]] *[[:en:Sakawa River|Sakawa River]] *[[Tenryū River]] *[[:en:Toyo River|Toyo River]] *[[:en:Yahagi River|Yahagi River]] *[[:en:Shōnai River|Shōnai River]] *[[:en:Kiso Three Rivers|Kiso Three Rivers]] **[[:en:Kiso River|Kiso River]] **[[:en:Nagara River|Nagara River]] **[[:en:Ibi River|Ibi River]] *[[:en:Kushida River|Kushida River]] *[[:en:Miya River (Mie)|Miya River]] *[[:en:Kita River|Kita River]] *[[:en:Minami River|Minami River]]
| group4 = [[:en:Kansai region|Kansai region]] | list4 = *[[:en:Choshi River|Choshi River]] *[[:en:Ibo River|Ibo River]] *[[:en:Kako River (Japan)|Kako River]] *[[:en:Kinokawa River|Kinokawa River]] *[[:en:Kumano River|Kumano River]] *[[:en:Kuzuryu River|Kuzuryu River]] *[[:en:Maruyama River|Maruyama River]] *[[:en:Muko River|Muko River]] *[[:en:Yamato River|Yamato River]] *[[:en:Yodo River|Yodo River]] **[[:en:Yasu River|Yasu River]] **[[:en:Katsura River|Katsura River]] **[[Kamo River]] **[[:en:Kizu River|Kizu River]] **[[:en:Dōtonbori|Dōton River]] *[[:en:Yura River (Japan)|Yura River]]

| group1 = [[:en:Sea of Japan|Sea of Japan]] | list1 = *[[:en:Ishikari River|Ishikari River]] **[[:en:Chitose River|Chitose River]] **[[:en:Toyohira River|Toyohira River]] ***[[:en:Makomanai River|Makomanai River]] ***[[:en:Anano River|Anano River]] **[[:en:Yūbari River|Yūbari River]] *[[:en:Koetoi River|Koetoi River]] *[[:en:Rumoi River|Rumoi River]] *[[:en:Shiribeshi-Toshibetsu River|Shiribeshi-Toshibetsu River]] *[[:en:Shiribetsu River|Shiribetsu River]] *[[:en:Teshio River|Teshio River]] *[[:en:Zenibako River|Zenibako River]]
